title: +notes -- character notes with public/private visibility
description: Demonstrates +notes: list, view, add, edit, set visibility, delete. Includes a staff edit of another player's note via the <player>/<name> syntax and the private-note visibility filter.

backstory.name: Backstory
backstory.text: Bob was born in a quiet seaside town.

secret.name: Secret
secret.text: Bob is hiding a stolen relic in the floorboards.

steps.note: +notes with no arguments shows your own notes. Fresh characters start with none.
+notes/add <name>=<text> creates a public note by default. Names are case-insensitive (stored under a slug).

steps.cmd: +notes/add Backstory=I trained as a thief in the old quarter before the Hollow took my eye.
steps.label: add Backstory

steps.note: /edit overwrites text but preserves visibility and creation metadata.

steps.cmd: +notes/edit Backstory=Born in the old quarter; lost an eye to the Hollow at sixteen.
steps.label: edit Backstory

steps.note: Private notes are visible only to the owner and staff (admin+ / wizard).

steps.sub: Viewing Another Player's Notes -- Public Only

steps.note: Bob has a public Backstory and a private Secret. As a non-staff non-owner, Lyra sees only the public one.

steps.sub: Staff Can Add Notes to Other Players

steps.note: +notes/add <player>/<name>=<text> writes onto another character. Requires canEdit (admin+ has it by default).

steps.cmd: +notes/add Bob/Sanction=Three days probation for unauthorised theft in the West Market.
steps.label: staff annotation

steps.note: Names are <= 40 chars and alphanumeric + spaces/underscores/hyphens. Text is <= 8000 chars.
